notes: Pure configuration constants — no imports from any marketmind module. MAX_PRO_CALLS_PER_SESSION=30 imported and used in: hvr_cycle.py (line 103, 182, 210, 233 — all compare pro_calls_counter[0] >= MAX_PRO_CALLS_PER_SESSION), investigation_loop.py (line 21), investigation_types.py (line 11 — InvestigationConfig uses CUSTOM thresholds from config, not MAX_PRO_CALLS_PER_SESSION directly).
